<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Deep Cleaning Guide – Clean Cleaners NYC</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{--navy:#0d2b4e;--blue:#1a6bbd;--sky:#4db8f0;--gold:#f4c542;--white:#ffffff;--gray:#6b7a8d;--green:#4df08c}
body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--navy);min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden}

.bg{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#071828 0%,#0d2b4e 45%,#0a3d6b 100%);overflow:hidden}
.bg::before{content:’’;position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 80% 20%,rgba(77,184,240,0.12) 0%,transparent 70%),radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 10% 80%,rgba(26,107,189,0.15) 0%,transparent 70%)}
.bg-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(77,184,240,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(77,184,240,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:48px 48px}

.wrapper{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:860px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 20px 120px}

header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:48px;animation:fadeDown 0.7s ease both}
.logo-img{width:180px;filter:brightness(0) invert(1) drop-shadow(0 4px 16px rgba(77,184,240,0.3));margin-bottom:20px}
h1{font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:clamp(42px,8vw,68px);letter-spacing:3px;color:var(–white);line-height:1;margin-bottom:10px}
h1 span{color:var(–sky)}
.subtitle{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-size:15px;font-weight:300}

.progress-wrap{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 28px;margin-bottom:40px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;animation:fadeDown 0.7s 0.15s ease both}
.progress-label{color:var(–sky);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap}
.progress-bar-track{flex:1;height:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:99px;overflow:hidden}
.progress-bar-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(–sky),var(–blue));border-radius:99px;transition:width 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);width:0%}
.progress-count{color:var(–white);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap}

.rooms{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}
.room-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color 0.3s,transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.3s;animation:fadeUp 0.6s ease both}
.room-card:hover{border-color:rgba(77,184,240,0.3);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(77,184,240,0.08)}
.room-card.open{border-color:rgba(77,184,240,0.4);background:rgba(77,184,240,0.05);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(77,184,240,0.12)}
.room-card.completed{border-color:rgba(77,240,140,0.3);background:rgba(77,240,140,0.03)}
.room-card:nth-child(1){animation-delay:0.1s}
.room-card:nth-child(2){animation-delay:0.2s}
.room-card:nth-child(3){animation-delay:0.3s}
.room-card:nth-child(4){animation-delay:0.4s}
.room-card:nth-child(5){animation-delay:0.5s}

.room-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;padding:22px 26px;cursor:pointer;user-select:none}
.room-num{font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(–sky);background:rgba(77,184,240,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(77,184,240,0.2);border-radius:8px;width:36px;height:36px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:background 0.3s}
.room-card.completed .room-num{background:rgba(77,240,140,0.15);border-color:rgba(77,240,140,0.3);color:var(–green)}
.room-emoji{font-size:26px;flex-shrink:0}
.room-title-wrap{flex:1}
.room-title{font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(–white);line-height:1}
.room-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(–gray);margin-top:3px}
.room-meta span{color:var(–sky);font-weight:500}
.room-toggle{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(–sky);font-size:16px;transition:transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1),background 0.2s;flex-shrink:0}
.room-card.open .room-toggle{transform:rotate(180deg);background:rgba(77,184,240,0.15)}

.room-body{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)}
.room-body.open{max-height:1200px}

/* DIAGRAM */
.room-diagram{margin:0 26px 0;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);position:relative;background:#0a1f35}
.diagram-inner{position:relative;width:100%;padding-bottom:52%;overflow:hidden}
.diagram-inner svg{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%}

/* CHECKLIST */
.checklist-wrap{padding:16px 26px 26px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)}
.checklist-title{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(–sky);font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px}
.checklist{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.check-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:14px;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.2s,border-color 0.2s;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
.check-item:hover{background:rgba(77,184,240,0.06);border-color:rgba(77,184,240,0.15)}
.check-item.checked{background:rgba(77,240,140,0.06);border-color:rgba(77,240,140,0.2)}
.checkbox{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:5px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:all 0.2s;margin-top:1px;font-size:11px;color:transparent}
.check-item.checked .checkbox{background:var(–green);border-color:var(–green);color:#0d2b4e;transform:scale(1.1)}
.check-label{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);line-height:1.5;transition:color 0.2s}
.check-item.checked .check-label{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);text-decoration:line-through;text-decoration-color:rgba(77,240,140,0.4)}

/* EXTRAS */
.extras-badge{display:inline-block;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–gold),#e8a800);color:#1a0e00;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;border-radius:6px;padding:3px 9px;margin-bottom:8px}
.extras-note{font-size:12px;color:var(–gray);margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.5}

/* COMPLETE */
.complete-banner{display:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(77,240,140,0.1),rgba(77,184,240,0.07));border:1px solid rgba(77,240,140,0.25);border-radius:20px;padding:32px;text-align:center;margin-top:32px;animation:popIn 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both}
.complete-banner.show{display:block}
.complete-icon{font-size:44px;margin-bottom:12px}
.complete-title{font-family:‘Bebas Neue’,sans-serif;font-size:32px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(–green);margin-bottom:8px}
.complete-sub{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-size:14px;line-height:1.6}
.cta-btn{display:inline-block;margin-top:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–sky),var(–blue));color:var(–white);font-size:15px;font-weight:600;padding:14px 32px;border-radius:14px;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(77,184,240,0.35);transition:transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s}
.cta-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 12px 36px rgba(77,184,240,0.45)}

/* FLOATING CTA */
.floating-cta{position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:100;animation:slideUp 0.6s 1s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both}
.cta-btn-float{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a6bbd,#0d4d8a);color:var(–white);font-size:14px;font-weight:600;padding:14px 28px;border-radius:99px;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4),0 0 0 1px rgba(77,184,240,0.3);white-space:nowrap;transition:transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s}
.cta-btn-float:hover{transform:translateY(-2px) scale(1.02)}

/* FOOTER */
footer{text-align:center;margin-top:56px;padding-top:32px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);animation:fadeUp 0.6s 0.6s ease both}
.footer-links{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:24px}
.footer-links a{color:var(–sky);text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;opacity:0.8;transition:opacity 0.2s}
.footer-links a:hover{opacity:1}
.bbb-wrap{margin:0 auto 16px;display:flex;justify-content:center}
.bbb-seal{width:110px;opacity:0.85;transition:opacity 0.2s}
.bbb-seal:hover{opacity:1}
.copyright{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);font-size:12px;margin-top:8px}

/* ANIMS */
@keyframes fadeDown{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes popIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.9)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}}
@keyframes slideUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(30px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}}

/* SVG DIAGRAM ANIMATIONS */
.hotspot{cursor:pointer}
.hotspot circle{transition:r 0.2s,opacity 0.2s}
.hotspot:hover circle{r:9}
.pulse-ring{animation:pulseRing 2s ease-out infinite}
@keyframes pulseRing{0%{r:6;opacity:0.8}100%{r:18;opacity:0}}
.arrow-line{stroke-dasharray:80;stroke-dashoffset:80;animation:drawArrow 0.6s ease forwards}
@keyframes drawArrow{to{stroke-dashoffset:0}}
.label-tag{opacity:0;animation:labelFadeIn 0.4s ease forwards}
@keyframes labelFadeIn{to{opacity:1}}

@media(max-width:480px){
.wrapper{padding:32px 14px 100px}
.room-header{padding:18px}
.checklist-wrap{padding:14px 18px 20px}
.room-diagram{margin:0 18px 0}
}
</style>

</head>
<body>
<div class="bg"><div class="bg-grid"></div></div>
<div class="wrapper">

<header>
  <img class="logo-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Clean Cleaners NYC">
  <h1>Deep <span>Cleaning</span> Guide</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Tap each room to see what we cover — then check off as we go</p>
</header>

<div class="progress-wrap">
  <div class="progress-label">Progress</div>
  <div class="progress-bar-track"><div class="progress-bar-fill" id="progressFill"></div></div>
  <div class="progress-count" id="progressCount">0 / 0 tasks</div>
</div>

<div class="rooms">

<!-- KITCHEN -->

<div class="room-card" data-room="0">
  <div class="room-header" onclick="toggleRoom(0)">
    <div class="room-num">1</div>
    <div class="room-emoji">🍳</div>
    <div class="room-title-wrap">
      <div class="room-title">Kitchen</div>
      <div class="room-meta"><span id="done-0">0</span> of 7 tasks done</div>
    </div>
    <div class="room-toggle">▾</div>
  </div>
  <div class="room-body" id="body-0">
    <div class="room-diagram" id="diag-0">
      <div class="diagram-inner">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 600 312" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="svg-0">
          <!-- Kitchen room background -->
          <rect width="600" height="312" fill="#0a1f35"/>
          <!-- Floor -->
          <rect x="0" y="220" width="600" height="92" fill="#0d2840" rx="0"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="220" x2="600" y2="220" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <!-- Floor tiles -->
          <line x1="100" y1="220" x2="100" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="200" y1="220" x2="200" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="300" y1="220" x2="300" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="400" y1="220" x2="400" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="500" y1="220" x2="500" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="266" x2="600" y2="266" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>

```
      <!-- Back wall cabinets top -->
      <rect x="20" y="30" width="170" height="70" rx="4" fill="#0f3358" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <line x1="105" y1="30" x2="105" y2="100" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="85" y="58" width="12" height="12" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.4)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <text x="105" y="120" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" text-anchor="middle">UPPER CABINETS</text>

      <!-- Countertop -->
      <rect x="20" y="135" width="560" height="14" rx="3" fill="#163d5e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>

      <!-- Sink -->
      <rect x="240" y="138" width="120" height="50" rx="4" fill="#0a2a45" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.4)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <rect x="250" y="145" width="45" height="36" rx="3" fill="#081e33" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="305" y="145" width="45" height="36" rx="3" fill="#081e33" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <circle cx="283" cy="163" r="4" fill="none" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <circle cx="328" cy="163" r="4" fill="none" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1.5"/>

      <!-- Stove -->
      <rect x="60" y="138" width="110" height="55" rx="4" fill="#0f3050" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.35)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <circle cx="90" cy="160" r="14" fill="#0a2035" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <circle cx="90" cy="160" r="7" fill="none" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.4)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <circle cx="140" cy="160" r="14" fill="#0a2035" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <circle cx="140" cy="160" r="7" fill="none" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.4)" stroke-width="1"/>

      <!-- Fridge -->
      <rect x="450" y="80" width="100" height="140" rx="6" fill="#0f3358" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <line x1="450" y1="150" x2="550" y2="150" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="462" y="110" width="8" height="30" rx="2" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.4)"/>
      <rect x="462" y="160" width="8" height="30" rx="2" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.4)"/>

      <!-- Lower cabinets -->
      <rect x="20" y="188" width="560" height="32" rx="3" fill="#0f3050" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="120" y1="188" x2="120" y2="220" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="240" y1="188" x2="240" y2="220" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="360" y1="188" x2="360" y2="220" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="450" y1="188" x2="450" y2="220" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/>

      <!-- Baseboard -->
      <rect x="0" y="215" width="600" height="5" rx="0" fill="#1a4a6e" opacity="0.6"/>

      <!-- HOTSPOT 1: Surfaces / Counters -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(0,0)" style="animation-delay:0.3s">
        <circle cx="180" cy="135" r="7" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="180" cy="135" r="6" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="180" y1="128" x2="180" y2="100" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.5s"/>
        <polygon points="175,100 185,100 180,92" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.9)" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:0.9s"/>
        <rect x="130" y="74" width="100" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:0.9s"/>
        <text x="180" y="88" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:0.9s">SURFACES</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT 2: Stove -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(0,2)" style="animation-delay:0.5s">
        <circle cx="115" cy="157" r="7" fill="rgba(244,197,66,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="115" cy="157" r="6" fill="rgba(244,197,66,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="115" y1="150" x2="70" y2="115" stroke="rgba(244,197,66,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.7s"/>
        <rect x="20" y="98" width="100" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(244,197,66,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.1s"/>
        <text x="70" y="112" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.1s">STOVE / OVEN</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT 3: Sink -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(0,0)" style="animation-delay:0.7s">
        <circle cx="300" cy="162" r="7" fill="rgba(77,240,140,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="300" cy="162" r="6" fill="rgba(77,240,140,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="300" y1="155" x2="300" y2="120" stroke="rgba(77,240,140,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.9s"/>
        <rect x="255" y="103" width="90" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,240,140,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.3s"/>
        <text x="300" y="117" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.3s">SINK AREA</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT 4: Fridge -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(0,4)" style="animation-delay:0.9s">
        <circle cx="500" cy="130" r="7" fill="rgba(240,140,77,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="500" cy="130" r="6" fill="rgba(240,140,77,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="500" y1="123" x2="500" y2="92" stroke="rgba(240,140,77,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:1.1s"/>
        <rect x="455" y="74" width="90" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(240,140,77,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.5s"/>
        <text x="500" y="88" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.5s">FRIDGE</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT 5: Cabinets -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(0,5)" style="animation-delay:1.1s">
        <circle cx="105" cy="65" r="7" fill="rgba(184,77,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="105" cy="65" r="6" fill="rgba(184,77,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="105" y1="58" x2="105" y2="38" stroke="rgba(184,77,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:1.3s"/>
        <rect x="60" y="18" width="90" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(184,77,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.7s"/>
        <text x="105" y="32" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.7s">CABINETS</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT 6: Baseboards & Floor -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(0,6)" style="animation-delay:1.3s">
        <circle cx="400" cy="240" r="7" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="400" cy="240" r="6" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="400" y1="247" x2="400" y2="275" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:1.5s"/>
        <rect x="340" y="275" width="120" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.9s"/>
        <text x="400" y="289" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.9s">FLOORS + BASEBOARDS</text>
      </g>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="checklist-wrap">
  <div class="checklist-title">Checklist</div>
  <div class="checklist" id="list-0">
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,0)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Degrease all surfaces and appliances</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,0)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Clean counter(s)</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,0)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Clean stove and oven (exterior)</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,0)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Microwave — interior included</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,0)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Clean outside of refrigerator</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,0)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Cabinets (exterior)</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,0)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Vacuum and mop floors + baseboards</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

  </div>
</div>

<!-- BATHROOM -->

<div class="room-card" data-room="1">
  <div class="room-header" onclick="toggleRoom(1)">
    <div class="room-num">2</div>
    <div class="room-emoji">🚿</div>
    <div class="room-title-wrap">
      <div class="room-title">Bathroom</div>
      <div class="room-meta"><span id="done-1">0</span> of 7 tasks done</div>
    </div>
    <div class="room-toggle">▾</div>
  </div>
  <div class="room-body" id="body-1">
    <div class="room-diagram" id="diag-1">
      <div class="diagram-inner">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 600 312" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="svg-1">
          <rect width="600" height="312" fill="#0a1f35"/>
          <!-- Floor -->
          <rect x="0" y="220" width="600" height="92" fill="#0d2840"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="220" x2="600" y2="220" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <!-- tile pattern -->
          <line x1="150" y1="220" x2="150" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="300" y1="220" x2="300" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="450" y1="220" x2="450" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="266" x2="600" y2="266" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.08)" stroke-width="1"/>

```
      <!-- Shower/Tub -->
      <rect x="20" y="60" width="200" height="155" rx="6" fill="#0a2840" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <rect x="30" y="70" width="180" height="135" rx="4" fill="#081e33" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <!-- shower head -->
      <circle cx="185" cy="95" r="12" fill="none" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.4)" stroke-width="2"/>
      <circle cx="185" cy="95" r="5" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)"/>
      <!-- glass door line -->
      <line x1="220" y1="60" x2="220" y2="215" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="2"/>
      <!-- drain -->
      <circle cx="120" cy="195" r="8" fill="none" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>

      <!-- Toilet -->
      <ellipse cx="350" cy="175" rx="50" ry="35" fill="#0f3050" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <rect x="310" y="135" width="80" height="40" rx="8" fill="#0f3358" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <rect x="315" y="105" width="70" height="32" rx="4" fill="#122d4a" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1.5"/>

      <!-- Sink / Vanity -->
      <rect x="420" y="140" width="160" height="80" rx="6" fill="#0f3050" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <ellipse cx="500" cy="175" rx="45" ry="28" fill="#081e33" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.35)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <circle cx="500" cy="175" r="8" fill="none" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <!-- faucet -->
      <rect x="495" y="148" width="10" height="20" rx="3" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)"/>

      <!-- Mirror -->
      <rect x="420" y="40" width="160" height="90" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.4)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <rect x="428" y="48" width="144" height="74" rx="2" fill="#0a2035" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <!-- mirror reflection hint -->
      <line x1="435" y1="55" x2="480" y2="115" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" stroke-width="8"/>

      <!-- Baseboard -->
      <rect x="0" y="215" width="600" height="5" fill="#1a4a6e" opacity="0.6"/>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Shower/Tub -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(1,4)">
        <circle cx="120" cy="140" r="7" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="120" cy="140" r="6" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="120" y1="133" x2="120" y2="100" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.4s"/>
        <rect x="70" y="82" width="100" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:0.8s"/>
        <text x="120" y="96" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:0.8s">SHOWER / TUB</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Toilet -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(1,1)">
        <circle cx="350" cy="150" r="7" fill="rgba(244,197,66,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="350" cy="150" r="6" fill="rgba(244,197,66,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="350" y1="143" x2="350" y2="110" stroke="rgba(244,197,66,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.6s"/>
        <rect x="300" y="92" width="100" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(244,197,66,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.0s"/>
        <text x="350" y="106" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.0s">TOILET</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Sink -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(1,0)">
        <circle cx="500" cy="165" r="7" fill="rgba(77,240,140,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="500" cy="165" r="6" fill="rgba(77,240,140,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="500" y1="158" x2="500" y2="138" stroke="rgba(77,240,140,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.8s"/>
        <rect x="455" y="120" width="90" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,240,140,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.2s"/>
        <text x="500" y="134" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.2s">SINK</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Mirror -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(1,2)">
        <circle cx="500" cy="85" r="7" fill="rgba(240,140,77,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="500" cy="85" r="6" fill="rgba(240,140,77,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="500" y1="78" x2="500" y2="56" stroke="rgba(240,140,77,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:1.0s"/>
        <rect x="450" y="38" width="100" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(240,140,77,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.4s"/>
        <text x="500" y="52" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.4s">MIRROR</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Glass Door -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(1,6)">
        <circle cx="220" cy="140" r="7" fill="rgba(184,77,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="220" cy="140" r="6" fill="rgba(184,77,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="227" y1="140" x2="265" y2="110" stroke="rgba(184,77,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:1.2s"/>
        <rect x="255" y="92" width="100" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(184,77,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.6s"/>
        <text x="305" y="106" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.6s">GLASS DOORS</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Floor/Baseboards -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(1,5)">
        <circle cx="300" cy="240" r="7" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="300" cy="240" r="6" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="300" y1="247" x2="300" y2="278" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:1.4s"/>
        <rect x="240" y="278" width="120" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.8s"/>
        <text x="300" y="292" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.8s">FLOORS + BASEBOARDS</text>
      </g>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="checklist-wrap">
  <div class="checklist-title">Checklist</div>
  <div class="checklist" id="list-1">
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,1)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Disinfect and clean sink(s)</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,1)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Toilet — inside and outside</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,1)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Wipe down mirrors and counters</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,1)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Empty trash bins</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,1)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Bathtub / Shower / Jacuzzi</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,1)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Vacuum and mop floors</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,1)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Glass doors + baseboards</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

  </div>
</div>

<!-- BEDROOM -->

<div class="room-card" data-room="2">
  <div class="room-header" onclick="toggleRoom(2)">
    <div class="room-num">3</div>
    <div class="room-emoji">🛏️</div>
    <div class="room-title-wrap">
      <div class="room-title">Bedroom</div>
      <div class="room-meta"><span id="done-2">0</span> of 5 tasks done</div>
    </div>
    <div class="room-toggle">▾</div>
  </div>
  <div class="room-body" id="body-2">
    <div class="room-diagram" id="diag-2">
      <div class="diagram-inner">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 600 312" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="svg-2">
          <rect width="600" height="312" fill="#0a1f35"/>
          <rect x="0" y="220" width="600" height="92" fill="#0d2840"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="220" x2="600" y2="220" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <!-- wood floor lines -->
          <line x1="0" y1="240" x2="600" y2="240" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="260" x2="600" y2="260" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="280" x2="600" y2="280" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="300" x2="600" y2="300" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="200" y1="220" x2="200" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.05)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="400" y1="220" x2="400" y2="312" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.05)" stroke-width="1"/>

```
      <!-- Bed -->
      <rect x="150" y="100" width="300" height="120" rx="8" fill="#0f3050" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <!-- headboard -->
      <rect x="150" y="85" width="300" height="25" rx="6" fill="#163d5e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.35)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <!-- pillows -->
      <rect x="165" y="108" width="110" height="45" rx="8" fill="#1a4a6e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="325" y="108" width="110" height="45" rx="8" fill="#1a4a6e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <!-- blanket -->
      <rect x="155" y="155" width="290" height="60" rx="4" fill="#0d3a5c" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>

      <!-- Nightstand L -->
      <rect x="60" y="130" width="75" height="70" rx="4" fill="#0f3358" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <rect x="75" y="145" width="45" height="12" rx="2" fill="#0a2035" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="75" y="165" width="45" height="12" rx="2" fill="#0a2035" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>

      <!-- Nightstand R -->
      <rect x="465" y="130" width="75" height="70" rx="4" fill="#0f3358" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <rect x="480" y="145" width="45" height="12" rx="2" fill="#0a2035" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="480" y="165" width="45" height="12" rx="2" fill="#0a2035" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>

      <!-- Dresser with mirror -->
      <rect x="20" y="40" width="110" height="80" rx="4" fill="#0f3358" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <rect x="30" y="50" width="40" height="25" rx="2" fill="#081e33" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="80" y="50" width="40" height="25" rx="2" fill="#081e33" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="30" y="85" width="90" height="25" rx="2" fill="#081e33" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <!-- mirror above dresser -->
      <rect x="30" y="10" width="90" height="32" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.35)" stroke-width="1.5"/>

      <!-- Wardrobe -->
      <rect x="460" y="20" width="130" height="80" rx="4" fill="#0f3358" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <line x1="525" y1="20" x2="525" y2="100" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="472" y="55" width="8" height="16" rx="2" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.35)"/>
      <rect x="537" y="55" width="8" height="16" rx="2" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.35)"/>

      <!-- Baseboard -->
      <rect x="0" y="215" width="600" height="5" fill="#1a4a6e" opacity="0.6"/>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Surfaces/Furniture/Shelves -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(2,0)">
        <circle cx="75" cy="80" r="7" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="75" cy="80" r="6" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="75" y1="73" x2="75" y2="50" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.4s"/>
        <rect x="20" y="30" width="110" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:0.8s"/>
        <text x="75" y="44" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:0.8s">SURFACES / FURNITURE</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Mirror / Glass -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(2,1)">
        <circle cx="75" cy="26" r="7" fill="rgba(240,140,77,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="75" cy="26" r="6" fill="rgba(240,140,77,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="75" y1="19" x2="130" y2="12" stroke="rgba(240,140,77,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.6s"/>
        <rect x="128" y="4" width="90" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(240,140,77,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.0s"/>
        <text x="173" y="18" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.0s">MIRRORS / GLASS</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Bed / Furniture -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(2,0)">
        <circle cx="300" cy="165" r="7" fill="rgba(77,240,140,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="300" cy="165" r="6" fill="rgba(77,240,140,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="300" y1="158" x2="300" y2="125" stroke="rgba(77,240,140,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.8s"/>
        <rect x="250" y="107" width="100" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,240,140,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.2s"/>
        <text x="300" y="121" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.2s">BED / HEADBOARD</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Wardrobe -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(2,0)">
        <circle cx="525" cy="60" r="7" fill="rgba(184,77,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="525" cy="60" r="6" fill="rgba(184,77,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="525" y1="53" x2="525" y2="28" stroke="rgba(184,77,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:1.0s"/>
        <rect x="475" y="10" width="100" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(184,77,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.4s"/>
        <text x="525" y="24" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.4s">WARDROBE / SHELVES</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Floor/Baseboards -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(2,4)">
        <circle cx="300" cy="245" r="7" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="300" cy="245" r="6" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="300" y1="252" x2="300" y2="278" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:1.2s"/>
        <rect x="240" y="278" width="120" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.6s"/>
        <text x="300" y="292" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.6s">FLOORS + BASEBOARDS</text>
      </g>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="checklist-wrap">
  <div class="checklist-title">Checklist</div>
  <div class="checklist" id="list-2">
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,2)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Dust surfaces, furniture, shelves and baseboards</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,2)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Wipe down mirrors and glass surfaces</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,2)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Vacuum and mop floors</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,2)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Carpet / rug cleaning (let us know in advance)</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,2)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Baseboards</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

  </div>
</div>

<!-- LIVING AREA -->

<div class="room-card" data-room="3">
  <div class="room-header" onclick="toggleRoom(3)">
    <div class="room-num">4</div>
    <div class="room-emoji">🛋️</div>
    <div class="room-title-wrap">
      <div class="room-title">Living Area</div>
      <div class="room-meta"><span id="done-3">0</span> of 5 tasks done</div>
    </div>
    <div class="room-toggle">▾</div>
  </div>
  <div class="room-body" id="body-3">
    <div class="room-diagram" id="diag-3">
      <div class="diagram-inner">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 600 312" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="svg-3">
          <rect width="600" height="312" fill="#0a1f35"/>
          <rect x="0" y="220" width="600" height="92" fill="#0d2840"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="220" x2="600" y2="220" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <!-- wood planks -->
          <line x1="0" y1="240" x2="600" y2="240" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="260" x2="600" y2="260" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="280" x2="600" y2="280" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="300" x2="600" y2="300" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.06)" stroke-width="1"/>

```
      <!-- TV / Media unit -->
      <rect x="170" y="30" width="260" height="50" rx="4" fill="#0a1f35" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.35)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <rect x="178" y="38" width="244" height="34" rx="2" fill="#060f1a" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <!-- TV stand -->
      <rect x="150" y="80" width="300" height="30" rx="4" fill="#0f3050" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <line x1="300" y1="80" x2="300" y2="110" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/>

      <!-- Sofa -->
      <rect x="80" y="145" width="440" height="70" rx="8" fill="#0f3358" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <!-- seat cushions -->
      <rect x="90" y="155" width="130" height="50" rx="6" fill="#163d5e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="235" y="155" width="130" height="50" rx="6" fill="#163d5e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="380" y="155" width="130" height="50" rx="6" fill="#163d5e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <!-- armrests -->
      <rect x="80" y="148" width="35" height="67" rx="6" fill="#1a4a6e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <rect x="485" y="148" width="35" height="67" rx="6" fill="#1a4a6e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>

      <!-- Coffee table -->
      <rect x="200" y="120" width="200" height="25" rx="4" fill="#0f3050" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.25)" stroke-width="1.5"/>

      <!-- Bookshelf/surface right -->
      <rect x="520" y="40" width="60" height="120" rx="4" fill="#0f3358" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <line x1="520" y1="80" x2="580" y2="80" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <line x1="520" y1="120" x2="580" y2="120" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/>

      <!-- Plant -->
      <rect x="28" y="140" width="30" height="30" rx="4" fill="#0a2035" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
      <ellipse cx="43" cy="128" rx="22" ry="18" fill="#0d3320" stroke="rgba(77,240,100,0.25)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <line x1="43" y1="140" x2="43" y2="128" stroke="rgba(77,200,80,0.4)" stroke-width="2"/>

      <!-- Baseboard -->
      <rect x="0" y="215" width="600" height="5" fill="#1a4a6e" opacity="0.6"/>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: TV/Entertainment -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(3,0)">
        <circle cx="300" cy="55" r="7" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="300" cy="55" r="6" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="300" y1="48" x2="300" y2="28" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.4s"/>
        <rect x="250" y="10" width="100" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:0.8s"/>
        <text x="300" y="24" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:0.8s">TV / SURFACES</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Sofa/Furniture -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(3,0)">
        <circle cx="300" cy="170" r="7" fill="rgba(244,197,66,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="300" cy="170" r="6" fill="rgba(244,197,66,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="300" y1="163" x2="220" y2="130" stroke="rgba(244,197,66,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.6s"/>
        <rect x="150" y="112" width="140" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(244,197,66,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.0s"/>
        <text x="220" y="126" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.0s">FURNITURE / SHELVES</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Mirrors/Glass -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(3,1)">
        <circle cx="550" cy="80" r="7" fill="rgba(240,140,77,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="550" cy="80" r="6" fill="rgba(240,140,77,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="550" y1="73" x2="550" y2="50" stroke="rgba(240,140,77,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:0.8s"/>
        <rect x="500" y="32" width="96" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(240,140,77,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.2s"/>
        <text x="548" y="46" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.2s">GLASS SURFACES</text>
      </g>

      <!-- HOTSPOT: Floor/Baseboards -->
      <g class="hotspot" onclick="highlightItem(3,4)">
        <circle cx="150" cy="245" r="7" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.9)"/>
        <circle cx="150" cy="245" r="6" fill="rgba(77,184,240,0.3)" class="pulse-ring"/>
        <line x1="150" y1="252" x2="150" y2="278" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.8)" stroke-width="1.5" class="arrow-line" style="animation-delay:1.0s"/>
        <rect x="90" y="278" width="120" height="20" rx="4" fill="#0d2b4e" stroke="rgba(77,184,240,0.5)" stroke-width="1" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.4s"/>
        <text x="150" y="292" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" class="label-tag" style="animation-delay:1.4s">FLOORS + BASEBOARDS</text>
      </g>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="checklist-wrap">
  <div class="checklist-title">Checklist</div>
  <div class="checklist" id="list-3">
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,3)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Dust surfaces, furniture, shelves and baseboards</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,3)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Wipe down mirrors and glass surfaces</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,3)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Vacuum and mop floors</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,3)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Carpet / rug cleaning (let us know in advance)</div></div>
    <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,3)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Baseboards</div></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

  </div>
</div>

<!-- EXTRAS -->

<div class="room-card" data-room="4">
  <div class="room-header" onclick="toggleRoom(4)">
    <div class="room-num" style="color:var(--gold);background:rgba(244,197,66,0.1);border-color:rgba(244,197,66,0.2)">+</div>
    <div class="room-emoji">⭐</div>
    <div class="room-title-wrap">
      <div class="room-title">Extras</div>
      <div class="room-meta">Add-on services · <span id="done-4">0</span> of 3 selected</div>
    </div>
    <div class="room-toggle">▾</div>
  </div>
  <div class="room-body" id="body-4">
    <div class="checklist-wrap">
      <div class="extras-badge">Add-Ons</div>
      <p class="extras-note">Not included in the standard deep clean. Ask us to add any of these to your service.</p>
      <div class="checklist" id="list-4">
        <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,4)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Clean oven inside</div></div>
        <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,4)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Clean fridge / refrigerator inside</div></div>
        <div class="check-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this,4)"><div class="checkbox">✓</div><div class="check-label">Clean cabinets inside</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- /rooms -->

<!-- COMPLETE BANNER -->

<div class="complete-banner" id="completeBanner">
  <div class="complete-icon">✅</div>
  <div class="complete-title">Looks Good!</div>
  <p class="complete-sub">Now you know exactly what a deep clean with us includes.<br>Ready to get your place sparkling?</p>
  <a class="cta-btn" href="sms:+1YOURNUMBER?body=Hi! I just went through your deep cleaning guide and I am interested in booking a service." target="_blank">💬 Text Us to Get a Free Quote</a>
</div>

<!-- FLOATING CTA -->

<div class="floating-cta" id="floatingCta">
  <a href="sms:+1YOURNUMBER?body=Hi! I saw your deep cleaning guide and I would like to get a quote." class="cta-btn-float">✅ Ready?</a>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->

<footer>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="https://cleancleanersnyc.com" target="_blank">cleancleanersnyc.com</a>
    <a href="tel:+1YOURNUMBER">Call / Text Us</a>
    <a href="mailto:info@cleancleanersnyc.com">Email Us</a>
  </div>
  <div class="bbb-wrap">
    <a href="https://www.bbb.org/us/ny/brooklyn/profile/cleaning-services/clean-cleaners-nyc-llc-0121-92040750" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <img src="https://seal-newyork.bbb.org/seals/blue-seal-200-42-bbb-1007620.png" alt="BBB Accredited Business" class="bbb-seal"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'">
    </a>
  </div>
  <p class="copyright">© 2025 Clean Cleaners NYC LLC · Brooklyn, NY</p>
</footer>

</div><!-- /wrapper -->

<script>
const roomCounts = [7, 7, 5, 5, 3];
const roomDone   = [0, 0, 0, 0, 0];

function toggleRoom(idx) {
  var card = document.querySelector('[data-room="' + idx + '"]');
  var body = document.getElementById('body-' + idx);
  var isOpen = card.classList.contains('open');
  card.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen);
  body.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen);
}

function toggleCheck(el, roomIdx) {
  var wasChecked = el.classList.contains('checked');
  el.classList.toggle('checked', !wasChecked);
  roomDone[roomIdx] += wasChecked ? -1 : 1;
  updateRoom(roomIdx);
  updateProgress();
}

function updateRoom(idx) {
  var done = roomDone[idx];
  document.getElementById('done-' + idx).textContent = done;
  var card = document.querySelector('[data-room="' + idx + '"]');
  card.classList.toggle('completed', done === roomCounts[idx]);
}

function updateProgress() {
  var total = 0; var done = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < roomCounts.length; i++) { total += roomCounts[i]; done += roomDone[i]; }
  var pct = total > 0 ? (done / total) * 100 : 0;
  document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('progressCount').textContent = done + ' / ' + total + ' tasks';
  var standardDone = roomDone[0] + roomDone[1] + roomDone[2] + roomDone[3];
  var standardTotal = roomCounts[0] + roomCounts[1] + roomCounts[2] + roomCounts[3];
  var banner = document.getElementById('completeBanner');
  banner.classList.toggle('show', standardDone === standardTotal && standardTotal > 0);
}

function highlightItem(roomIdx, itemIdx) {
  var list = document.getElementById('list-' + roomIdx);
  var items = list.querySelectorAll('.check-item');
  if (items[itemIdx]) {
    items[itemIdx].style.background = 'rgba(77,184,240,0.15)';
    items[itemIdx].style.borderColor = 'rgba(77,184,240,0.5)';
    setTimeout(function() {
      items[itemIdx].style.background = '';
      items[itemIdx].style.borderColor = '';
    }, 1500);
  }
}

updateProgress();
</script>

</body>
</html>
